meta.title: HSE Leadership — Board Safety KPI Dashboard
meta.subtitle: Quarterly leadership review, Q2 2026
meta.author: HSE Leadership
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This leadership review presents the safety KPI dashboard and the ESG disclosure index for the quarter. Leading indicators improved; the lagging TRIR sits marginally above target and carries a P1 action.

sections.caption: ESG disclosure index — framework code to disclosure to report location

rows.title: TRIR above board target
rows.description: Recordable rate is improving but remains above the 1.80 board target.

rows.title: Aging open corrective actions cleared
rows.description: Overdue actions cut from 11 to 6 after the action-ageing initiative.

rows.control: Design out the top-3 recordable-injury task families

rows.action: Charter a TRIR-reduction programme for the top-3 task families
Lock the ESG disclosure index into the annual report cycle

sections.text: The board target is a leading commitment: the TRIR-reduction programme must report progress at every board meeting until target is met.

items: GRI 403 / SASB / ESRS S1 disclosure frameworks
